listing.title: Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program – University of Malawi
listing.description: Full undergraduate scholarships for academically talented young Malawians from economically disadvantaged backgrounds. Covers tuition, accommodation, meals, and a personal allowance.

details.title: Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program – University of Malawi
details.description: Full undergraduate scholarships for academically talented young Malawians from economically disadvantaged backgrounds. Covers tuition, accommodation, meals, and a personal allowance.

listing.title: Software Engineer (Full-Stack)
listing.description: Join our growing engineering team to build and maintain scalable web applications serving thousands of Malawian users daily. You will work closely with product managers and designers to deliver high-quality features.

details.job_description: We are looking for a passionate full-stack developer to join our product team in Lilongwe. You will be responsible for designing and implementing new features across both frontend and backend systems, contributing to architecture decisions, and mentoring junior developers.
responsibilities: Build responsive frontend interfaces using React
requirements: 3+ years of professional software development experience
Proficiency in PHP or Node.js for backend

listing.title: USAID Kulima Agricultural Innovation Grant
listing.description: Funding of up to $15,000 for smallholder farming cooperatives implementing climate-smart agricultural practices in the Central Region.

details.title: USAID Kulima Agricultural Innovation Grant
details.description: Funding of up to $15,000 for smallholder farming cooperatives implementing climate-smart agricultural practices in the Central Region.

listing.title: Accountant – Financial Reporting
listing.description: Exciting opportunity for a detail-oriented accountant to manage financial reporting and compliance for a leading financial services firm in Blantyre.

details.job_description: We are seeking a qualified accountant to lead monthly financial reporting, tax compliance, and audit preparation. The role requires strong analytical skills and familiarity with IFRS standards.
responsibilities: Analyze financial performance and flag variances
requirements: Knowledge of Malawi Revenue Authority regulations

listing.title: Agricultural Extension Officer
listing.description: Support smallholder farmers in Salima district with modern farming techniques, input distribution coordination, and crop monitoring.

details.job_description: The Agricultural Extension Officer will work directly with farming communities across Salima district, providing technical guidance on best agronomic practices, coordinating demonstration plots, and reporting on seasonal crop performance.
responsibilities: Conduct training sessions for smallholder farmers
requirements: Diploma or degree in Agriculture or related field
Willingness to travel to rural communities

listing.title: Digital Marketing Officer
listing.description: Drive brand awareness and lead generation through targeted social media campaigns, SEO strategy, and content creation for a fast-growing Malawian e-commerce platform.

details.job_description: We need a creative and data-driven digital marketer to grow our online presence across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and Google. You will manage ad campaigns, track KPIs, produce content, and report on marketing ROI.
responsibilities: Manage paid social and Google Ads campaigns
Create and schedule social media content
Monitor analytics and prepare performance reports
Coordinate with design team on creative assets
requirements: Degree in Marketing, Communications or related field
Experience with Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads
Proficiency in Canva or Adobe suite

listing.title: Lake Malawi Water Levels Decline – Community Alert
listing.description: Residents around Mangochi and Salima have reported the lowest lake water levels in recent memory. Fishermen are worried about shrinking fish stocks and receding shorelines.

details.content: The water levels at Lake Malawi have dropped significantly this dry season. Fishermen in Monkey Bay and Cape Maclear are now walking hundreds of metres further to launch their boats. Has anyone else noticed this? The government should be investigating the long-term environmental impact. Tag someone who needs to see this. 🌊 #LakeMalawi #Environment #Malawi

listing.title: YALI Regional Leadership Center – East Africa Fellowship
listing.description: Competitive four-week leadership and entrepreneurship fellowship for young African professionals aged 18–35. Includes in-person training in Nairobi and a follow-on community project grant.

details.title: YALI Regional Leadership Center – East Africa Fellowship
details.description: Competitive four-week leadership and entrepreneurship fellowship for young African professionals aged 18–35. Includes in-person training in Nairobi and a follow-on community project grant.

listing.title: Lilongwe Tech Meetup – April Edition Recap
listing.description: Over 80 developers, designers, and founders gathered at the iHub Lilongwe for an evening of talks, demos, and networking. Here are the highlights.

details.content: What an incredible night at the #LilongweTechMeetup! 🔥 We had 3 lightning talks on AI in agriculture, mobile money APIs, and startup fundraising in Malawi. Huge shoutout to all the speakers and to everyone who showed up. If you want to present at the next one, DMs are open. The ecosystem is growing — let's keep building! 💻🇲🇼

listing.title: Chevening Scholarships 2027 – Malawi
listing.description: Prestigious UK government scholarships for outstanding Malawian professionals to pursue a one-year masters degree at any UK university. Fully funded including flights, tuition, and living costs.

details.title: Chevening Scholarships 2027 – Malawi
details.description: Prestigious UK government scholarships for outstanding Malawian professionals to pursue a one-year masters degree at any UK university. Fully funded including flights, tuition, and living costs.
eligibility: At least 2 years of work experience
Commitment to return to Malawi post-study
Ineligible if previously awarded a Chevening Scholarship
benefits: Full tuition at any UK university
Lifelong access to Chevening alumni network

listing.title: Registered Nurse – Outpatient Department
listing.description: Private hospital in Mzuzu seeking an experienced registered nurse to join their outpatient department. Full-time, six days a week.

details.job_description: The Registered Nurse will triage and attend to outpatient clients, administer medication, maintain accurate patient records, and work collaboratively with physicians to deliver quality healthcare. The role requires composure under pressure and strong clinical judgment.
responsibilities: Maintain accurate patient records in the EMR system

listing.title: Procurement Officer
listing.description: Responsible for end-to-end procurement processes, supplier management, and compliance reporting for a leading FMCG company in Limbe, Blantyre.

details.job_description: The Procurement Officer will manage vendor sourcing, bid evaluation, purchase order processing, and supplier performance monitoring. You will ensure procurement activities comply with company policies and public procurement regulations where applicable.
responsibilities: Prepare tender documents and evaluate bids
requirements: Degree in Procurement, Business or Supply Chain
CIPS certification is an added advantage

listing.title: Frontend Developer (React)
listing.description: Fintech startup in Lilongwe hiring a React developer to build intuitive mobile-first web interfaces for their mobile money management platform.

details.job_description: You will design and implement pixel-perfect, accessible web interfaces for our mobile money platform used by over 50,000 Malawians. Working in an agile team, you will turn Figma designs into production-ready code with a strong focus on performance and UX.
responsibilities: Convert UI/UX designs into responsive React components
Integrate REST APIs and handle state management
Optimise app performance for low-bandwidth environments
Participate in sprint planning and retrospectives
requirements: Attention to detail and UX sensitivity

listing.title: Malawi Innovation Challenge Fund – Round 5
listing.description: Co-financing grants of MWK 5M–25M for Malawian SMEs developing innovative solutions in health, education, agriculture, or financial inclusion.

details.title: Malawi Innovation Challenge Fund – Round 5
details.description: Co-financing grants of MWK 5M–25M for Malawian SMEs developing innovative solutions in health, education, agriculture, or financial inclusion.
eligibility: Solution must be scalable and impact-driven

listing.title: Local Artisan Business Growing Thanks to Social Media
listing.description: Blantyre-based textile artist shares how she grew her chitenje fashion brand from a home workshop to a 12-person team, purely through Instagram and WhatsApp marketing.

details.content: Two years ago I was sewing in my bedroom with one machine. Today we are a team of 12 and we have shipped orders to South Africa, the UK, and the U.S. 🙌 I never took a business loan. I just posted every single day and showed my process. The Malawian market is ready — we just need to believe in ourselves. If you have a product, start posting. The internet has no borders. 🧵🎨 #MadeInMalawi #Chitenje

listing.title: Mandela Washington Fellowship for Young African Leaders
listing.description: Six-week academic and leadership institute in the United States for young African leaders in public management, business & entrepreneurship, or civic leadership.

details.title: Mandela Washington Fellowship for Young African Leaders
details.description: Six-week academic and leadership institute in the United States for young African leaders in public management, business & entrepreneurship, or civic leadership.
eligibility: Not a U.S. permanent resident or citizen
benefits: Fully funded to the United States
Academic programming at a U.S. university

listing.title: Logistics & Warehouse Supervisor
listing.description: Oversee inbound/outbound logistics and warehouse operations for a distribution company serving central and southern Malawi.

details.job_description: Lead a team of warehouse staff to ensure accurate stock management, timely dispatching of orders, and compliance with health and safety standards. You will coordinate with drivers, suppliers, and retail clients to optimise the supply chain.
responsibilities: Manage inventory tracking and stock reconciliation
requirements: Diploma or degree in Logistics, Supply Chain or Operations

listing.title: How I Passed MSCE with 8 Points While Working Part-Time
listing.description: A young Malawian shares practical study strategies that helped him score 8 aggregate points in MSCE while working at a local grocery store to support his family.

details.content: People keep asking me how I managed it. The honest answer? I studied from 9pm to midnight every night after work. I borrowed past papers from MANEB, I formed a study group with 4 friends, and I treated every weekend like an exam. It is possible. Do not let your circumstances become your ceiling. 📚 #MSCE #StudyMalawi #Education

listing.title: Road Repairs Complete: Zomba–Blantyre M1 Finally Fixed
listing.description: The Roads Authority has completed patching works on the notorious M1 stretch between Zomba and Blantyre after 18 months of community complaints.

details.content: Credit where it is due — the Roads Fund Administration has finally patched the M1 from Zomba roundabout to Limbe. For anyone who commutes on this road, you know what a difference this makes. Buses are no longer avoiding it. Let us hope the maintenance continues. Malawi moving forward 🇲🇼🛣️ #Roads #Malawi #Infrastructure

listing.title: Celebrating World Malaria Day from Nkhotakota District Hospital
listing.description: Healthcare workers at Nkhotakota District Hospital mark World Malaria Day with a community awareness campaign and free bed net distribution.

details.content: Today we distributed 500 ITNs (insecticide-treated nets) to households in TA Mwadzama as part of #WorldMalariaDay. Every net protects a family. Every family protected is a community stronger. Thank you to all the nurses, HSAs, and volunteers who made today possible. We will end malaria in our lifetime. 💪 #EndMalaria #Nkhotakota #HealthMalawi

listing.title: My Experience Applying for a Passport at Passport Office Lilongwe
listing.description: A step-by-step account of the new e-passport application process, with tips on avoiding common delays.

details.content: I finally got my passport after 3 weeks 🎉 For anyone about to apply: (1) Book the appointment online — do not just walk in. (2) Bring originals AND certified copies of every document. (3) The queue at 7am is much shorter than at 9am. (4) The MRA payment confirmation must be on letterhead. Hope this helps someone. Drop your questions below 👇 #Malawi #Passport #TravelTips

requirements: Degree in Marketing, Communications or related field

listing.title: Backyard Farming in Lilongwe — Growing Your Own Vegetables
listing.description: Urban farming is catching on in Lilongwe. Here is how one family is growing tomatoes, rape, and onions in their small yard, saving over MWK 30,000 a month on groceries.

details.content: We started our backyard garden in January with nothing but used cooking oil containers, good compost, and a watering can. 4 months in and we are harvesting tomatoes, rape, and onions every week. We are saving at least MWK 30,000 a month on veges. If you have even 3 square metres of space, start a garden. I will share our method in the comments 🌱🍅 #UrbanFarming #Lilongwe #KitchenGarden

listing.title: Backyard Farming in Lilongwe — Growing Your Own Vegetables
listing.description: Urban farming is catching on in Lilongwe. Here is how one family is growing tomatoes, rape, and onions in their small yard, saving over MWK 30,000 a month on groceries.

details.content: We started our backyard garden in January with nothing but used cooking oil containers, good compost, and a watering can. 4 months in and we are harvesting tomatoes, rape, and onions every week. We are saving at least MWK 30,000 a month on veges. If you have even 3 square metres of space, start a garden. I will share our method in the comments 🌱🍅 #UrbanFarming #Lilongwe #KitchenGarden

listing.description: Support smallholder farmers in Salima district with modern farming techniques, input distribution coordination, and crop monitoring.

responsibilities: Conduct training sessions for smallholder farmers
requirements: Diploma or degree in Agriculture or related field
Willingness to travel to rural communities

listing.title: Lake Malawi Water Levels Decline – Community Alert
listing.description: Residents around Mangochi and Salima have reported the lowest lake water levels in recent memory. Fishermen are worried about shrinking fish stocks and receding shorelines.

details.content: The water levels at Lake Malawi have dropped significantly this dry season. Fishermen in Monkey Bay and Cape Maclear are now walking hundreds of metres further to launch their boats. Has anyone else noticed this? The government should be investigating the long-term environmental impact. Tag someone who needs to see this. 🌊 #LakeMalawi #Environment #Malawi

listing.title: Lilongwe Tech Meetup – April Edition Recap
listing.description: Over 80 developers, designers, and founders gathered at the iHub Lilongwe for an evening of talks, demos, and networking. Here are the highlights.

details.content: What an incredible night at the #LilongweTechMeetup! 🔥 We had 3 lightning talks on AI in agriculture, mobile money APIs, and startup fundraising in Malawi. Huge shoutout to all the speakers and to everyone who showed up. If you want to present at the next one, DMs are open. The ecosystem is growing — let's keep building! 💻🇲🇼

listing.title: Registered Nurse – Outpatient Department
listing.description: Private hospital in Mzuzu seeking an experienced registered nurse to join their outpatient department. Full-time, six days a week.

details.job_description: The Registered Nurse will triage and attend to outpatient clients, administer medication, maintain accurate patient records, and work collaboratively with physicians to deliver quality healthcare. The role requires composure under pressure and strong clinical judgment.
responsibilities: Maintain accurate patient records in the EMR system

listing.title: Local Artisan Business Growing Thanks to Social Media
listing.description: Blantyre-based textile artist shares how she grew her chitenje fashion brand from a home workshop to a 12-person team, purely through Instagram and WhatsApp marketing.

details.content: Two years ago I was sewing in my bedroom with one machine. Today we are a team of 12 and we have shipped orders to South Africa, the UK, and the U.S. 🙌 I never took a business loan. I just posted every single day and showed my process. The Malawian market is ready — we just need to believe in ourselves. If you have a product, start posting. The internet has no borders. 🧵🎨 #MadeInMalawi #Chitenje

listing.title: Procurement Officer
listing.description: Responsible for end-to-end procurement processes, supplier management, and compliance reporting for a leading FMCG company in Limbe, Blantyre.

details.job_description: The Procurement Officer will manage vendor sourcing, bid evaluation, purchase order processing, and supplier performance monitoring. You will ensure procurement activities comply with company policies and public procurement regulations where applicable.
responsibilities: Prepare tender documents and evaluate bids
requirements: Degree in Procurement, Business or Supply Chain
CIPS certification is an added advantage

listing.title: How I Passed MSCE with 8 Points While Working Part-Time
listing.description: A young Malawian shares practical study strategies that helped him score 8 aggregate points in MSCE while working at a local grocery store to support his family.

details.content: People keep asking me how I managed it. The honest answer? I studied from 9pm to midnight every night after work. I borrowed past papers from MANEB, I formed a study group with 4 friends, and I treated every weekend like an exam. It is possible. Do not let your circumstances become your ceiling. 📚 #MSCE #StudyMalawi #Education

listing.title: Frontend Developer (React)
listing.description: Fintech startup in Lilongwe hiring a React developer to build intuitive mobile-first web interfaces for their mobile money management platform.

details.job_description: You will design and implement pixel-perfect, accessible web interfaces for our mobile money platform used by over 50,000 Malawians. Working in an agile team, you will turn Figma designs into production-ready code with a strong focus on performance and UX.
responsibilities: Convert UI/UX designs into responsive React components
Integrate REST APIs and handle state management
Optimise app performance for low-bandwidth environments
Participate in sprint planning and retrospectives
requirements: Attention to detail and UX sensitivity

responsibilities: Manage inventory tracking and stock reconciliation
requirements: Diploma or degree in Logistics, Supply Chain or Operations

details.job_description: We are looking for a passionate full-stack developer to join our product team in Lilongwe. You will be responsible for designing and implementing new features across both frontend and backend systems, contributing to architecture decisions, and mentoring junior developers.
responsibilities: Build responsive frontend interfaces using React
requirements: 3+ years of professional software development experience
Proficiency in PHP or Node.js for backend

listing.title: Road Repairs Complete: Zomba–Blantyre M1 Finally Fixed
listing.description: The Roads Authority has completed patching works on the notorious M1 stretch between Zomba and Blantyre after 18 months of community complaints.

details.content: Credit where it is due — the Roads Fund Administration has finally patched the M1 from Zomba roundabout to Limbe. For anyone who commutes on this road, you know what a difference this makes. Buses are no longer avoiding it. Let us hope the maintenance continues. Malawi moving forward 🇲🇼🛣️ #Roads #Malawi #Infrastructure

listing.title: Celebrating World Malaria Day from Nkhotakota District Hospital
listing.description: Healthcare workers at Nkhotakota District Hospital mark World Malaria Day with a community awareness campaign and free bed net distribution.

details.content: Today we distributed 500 ITNs (insecticide-treated nets) to households in TA Mwadzama as part of #WorldMalariaDay. Every net protects a family. Every family protected is a community stronger. Thank you to all the nurses, HSAs, and volunteers who made today possible. We will end malaria in our lifetime. 💪 #EndMalaria #Nkhotakota #HealthMalawi

listing.title: My Experience Applying for a Passport at Passport Office Lilongwe
listing.description: A step-by-step account of the new e-passport application process, with tips on avoiding common delays.

details.content: I finally got my passport after 3 weeks 🎉 For anyone about to apply: (1) Book the appointment online — do not just walk in. (2) Bring originals AND certified copies of every document. (3) The queue at 7am is much shorter than at 9am. (4) The MRA payment confirmation must be on letterhead. Hope this helps someone. Drop your questions below 👇 #Malawi #Passport #TravelTips
